description: Business accounts in a mixture of Arabic and Judaeo-Arabic. Most of recto is crossed and scribbled out. Mentions the unit raṭl numerous times. The bottom entry of recto states that the balance owed to al-Ḥājj Ṭāhir is 2.5 raṭls and 1 2/3 raṭls. Verso contains a Judaeo-Arabic entry possibly concerning debts owed to Abū Yamīn (or Yumn?) related to a partnership in safflower (ʿuṣfur).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
